name: Pendle Finance
special_mechanism_summary: Pendle splits yield-bearing tokens into Principal Tokens (PT, zero-coupon bond redeemable 1:1 at maturity) and Yield Tokens (YT, which stream all yield to the holder until maturity). The AMM uses a custom asymptotic curve that prices PT at a time-value discount to par, converging to 1 at maturity. A SY (Standardized Yield) wrapper abstracts ERC-4626 and custom yield sources.
notes: C3' combination potential: PT price is the on-chain interest rate oracle for yield assets — Pendle's AMM spot price is manipulable via large swaps and consumed by protocols setting borrow rates; SY wrapper reads external exchange rates (e.g., wstETH/ETH) to compute yield streaming — divergence between SY-reported rate and market rate creates PT/YT arbitrage; post-maturity PT redeems exactly 1:1 enabling multi-leg pre/post-maturity strategies.
